reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong pass. Saturated pinks, sky blues, and vibrant greens nail the bright/warm/charming Hyrule palette. The fairy silhouette is round and friendly, surrounded by cheerful pink blooms and lush leaves — textbook toy-diorama feel. Zero grimness. Emotional resonance is high and immediately readable at all zoom levels. Technical axis (40%): Pass. 1px hard black outlines are consistent and unbroken around the fairy, wings, flowers, and leaves. Shading uses 2-3 hard tonal steps with no gradients or anti-aliasing detected. Pixels are grid-snapped throughout; the sprite reads as cleanly hand-pixeled. Comparison to Denzi summon-category reference confirms style parity — similar outline weight, palette saturation, and silhouette clarity. Combined weighted score: emotional ~9 × 0.6 + technical ~8 × 0.4 = 8.6, rounded to 9.
